title: Build unified admin portal
description: Single admin interface for all products. User management, billing, analytics, support.
result: 🎯 Product #67: BlackRoad Admin Portal DEPLOYED! Central management dashboard for 150+ products with real-time stats, product grid, usage charts, team/billing management, API keys, and quick actions. Live: https://85a7b485.blackroad-hello.pages.dev. BlackRoad design system with Hot Pink/Amber gradients, Golden Ratio spacing. Responsive sidebar navigation. Enterprise-ready admin interface!
